brief: Houthi attacks on Red Sea tankers and US strikes on Iran escalate Middle East tensions, while US signs a landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia. Domestically, Australia debates gas export tax, Massachusetts loosens abortion rules, and a Wisconsin police shooting sparks protests. Papers introduce a task taxonomy for edge bundling, a benchmark for multimodal LLMs, and efficient volume visualization techniques.
news_summary: Houthis claim attacks on Saudi oil tankers in Red Sea as US launches strikes on Iran; US signs nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia. In Australia, Labor calls for tougher gas export tax; Massachusetts passes bill to loosen late-term abortion restrictions; police shooting in Madison, Wisconsin leads to protests.
papers_summary: A task taxonomy for edge and trail bundling provides a structured vocabulary for visualization tasks; MV-Bench benchmarks multimodal LLMs for multi-view interface construction; ECoNGS proposes efficient compressive neural Gaussian splats for volume visualization.

en.brief: Houthi attacks on Red Sea tankers and US strikes on Iran escalate Middle East tensions, while US signs a landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia. Domestically, Australia debates gas export tax, Massachusetts loosens abortion rules, and a Wisconsin police shooting sparks protests. Papers introduce a task taxonomy for edge bundling, a benchmark for multimodal LLMs, and efficient volume visualization techniques.
en.news_summary: Houthis claim attacks on Saudi oil tankers in Red Sea as US launches strikes on Iran; US signs nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia. In Australia, Labor calls for tougher gas export tax; Massachusetts passes bill to loosen late-term abortion restrictions; police shooting in Madison, Wisconsin leads to protests.
en.papers_summary: A task taxonomy for edge and trail bundling provides a structured vocabulary for visualization tasks; MV-Bench benchmarks multimodal LLMs for multi-view interface construction; ECoNGS proposes efficient compressive neural Gaussian splats for volume visualization.

zh.brief: 今日头条关注TikTok英国直播带货热潮、华语金牌制片人施南生离世、日本男性短裤政策争议及特朗普诽谤案进展。国际方面，胡塞武装宣称袭击红海油轮，美国与沙特签署核协议。
zh.news_summary: BBD中文报道了TikTok直播带货在英国的兴起，华语电影金牌制片人施南生病逝，日本鼓励男性穿短裤引发性别平等争议，以及特朗普诉BBC诽谤案中法官强制公开文件。
zh.papers_summary: 无优先语言论文，国际研究涉及边缘捆绑可视化任务分类、多模态大模型界面构建及神经高斯泼溅高效压缩渲染。

todays_image.caption: Just as the flexible yet resilient brown algae *Lobophora sp.* withstands ocean currents, Labor must show "steel in the spine" to resist policy change on the gas export tax.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
